basic_details.job_title: Balmer Lawrie – Junior Officer, Manager and More – 43 Posts
basic_details.post_name: 22 different positions across Manager, Assistant Manager, Officer & Junior Officer grades
basic_details.short_information: The Balmer Lawrie Recruitment 2026 notification has been released for a total of 43 Junior Officer, Manager and More vacancies. The online application process will begin on 27 May 2026, and the last date to submit the application form is 13 June 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Any Graduate, Any Bachelors Degree, BCA, B.Com, B.Sc, M.Com, MBA/PGDM

salary_details.pay_scale: Linked to qualification & experience + statutory benefits (PF, ESI, Bonus, Gratuity)

how_to_apply: Unlike a standard walk-in, Balmer Lawrie requires mandatory online registration before appearing for the interview. Candidates who have not registered online can also register at the venue on interview days, but prior online registration is strongly recommended. Follow these steps:
seo_tags: Balmer Lawrie Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 43 Junior Officer, Manager and More Posts
